description_long: This is a modern, compact automatic coffee machine with a sleek, boxy design and a predominantly black exterior. The front features a digital display panel above a dispensing area, with a metallic drip tray and a transparent water reservoir on the left side. The machine has a flat top surface, likely for cup warming or access to internal compartments, and a side panel that appears to be solid and unadorned. The right side is mostly featureless, while the back has a small protruding power cord. The overall construction suggests a combination of plastic and metal materials, with some transparent elements for the water tank. The design is typical of high-end, fully automatic espresso or coffee machines found in urban kitchens, offices, or cafes.
description: A sleek, black automatic coffee machine with a digital display, metallic drip tray, and transparent water reservoir. Its modern, boxy design is accented by a prominent front control panel and clean lines.
description_view_0: Left side view showing the transparent water reservoir and the machine's solid, matte black body.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the digital display, dispensing area, metallic drip tray, and water reservoir on the left.
description_view_2: Right side view with a mostly solid black panel and the drip tray extending forward.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the flat back panel and a visible power cord protruding from the bottom.
attribute_brand_logo: A 'SIEMENS' brand logo is visible on the front panel below the digital display, rendered in silver or white text.
attribute_control_panel_layout: A rectangular digital display is centered at the top front, with several touch-sensitive buttons or icons arranged below it.
